description_long: This is a luxurious, three-seater sofa with a classic Chesterfield design, featuring deep diamond tufting across the backrest, arms, and lower front panel. The upholstery is a smooth, matte gray fabric, giving it a sophisticated and timeless appearance. The arms are wide, flared, and at the same height as the backrest, creating a continuous, enveloping silhouette. Two matching square cushions with button-tufted centers are placed symmetrically on the seat. The sofa stands on four short, dark wooden legs, slightly tapered and positioned at each corner for stability. The overall build suggests a sturdy wooden frame with plush cushioning for comfort, making it suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, lounges, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A gray, Chesterfield-style sofa with deep diamond tufting, flared arms, and two matching cushions, supported by four short, dark wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep tufting, two square cushions, and the flared arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, flared armrest and the continuous tufted pattern along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backrest with consistent diamond tufting and the sofa's overall curvature.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the flared armrest and tufted side panel visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single continuous seat cushion with two loose, square, button-tufted back cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and symmetrically placed.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flared armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered and deeply tufted, with a gently outward curve.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered legs made of dark wood, positioned at each corner, exposed and slightly angled outward.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a curved profile, fully upholstered and featuring deep diamond tufting throughout.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deep diamond-tufted upholstery with button detailing, creating a quilted, textured surface in a solid gray color.
